_note: In-cluster access + Route are the core testable flow. The real workshop.yaml provisions two things via spec.session.objects (operator-created, not by the session user): a Role granting the session SA route management, and the observe-only NetworkPolicy. deploy_workshop.py builds a minimal Workshop CR that omits session.objects, so those are applied as cluster-admin before this smoke run (mirroring what the Educates operator does on a real/portal deploy). verify-egress-blocked is EXPECTED TO FAIL on CRC — it has internet egress; the real DCS platform is air-gapped.

steps.run: envsubst < hello-dcs.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
